name: Hamza Health Tracker
one_liner: Personal health intelligence — turns blood reports, wearable data, and habits into actionable coaching across physical/mental/financial/career/spiritual coaches.
notes: Onboarded 2026-05-19. Personal-use product with a sophisticated multi-coach agent system already wired (business / career / financial / mental / physical / relationships / spiritual coaches). Consider productizing — could be a vertical SaaS. Stage assessment pending.
